2248670.name: MARTIAN CONQUER
2248670.description:
Martian Conquer is a fun science fiction-themed game that takes players to a futuristic world where they must safely guide a Martian spacecraft to its destination. The game features an exciting space battle, a unique crafting system, and stunning visuals. Players must complete missions, build up their base, and fight off relentless enemies while they explore the far reaches of the solar system. With its thrilling space battles, Martian Conquer is sure to provide a great gaming experience.


  • Main campaign with a mix of turn based strategy and space shooter.
  • Five mini missions with specific objectives
  • Arcade mode in which you must defeat bosses and pass levels
